Hi {{ $json['Business Name'] }} team,

Most {{ $json['Keyword Search'] }} businesses I work with are still handling tasks like appointment confirmations, customer follow-ups, and reminder messages manually — often taking 5–10 hours per week that could be fully automated.

What I could automate for {{ $json['Business Name'] }}:

  • Automated appointment reminders (SMS, email, WhatsApp)
  • No-show follow-up sequences that run 24/7
  • New customer onboarding messages
  • Review request automation after service

I specialize in building custom n8n automation workflows — these run continuously in the background, handling repetitive tasks so your team can focus on what actually matters: your customers.
